name: deep-review
description: Rigorous expert review workflow for papers and technical artifacts

interface.shortDescription: Adversarial paper and technical artifact review
interface.longDescription: Deep Review is a Codex plugin for rigorous review of papers and technical artifacts. It adds a skill that interviews the user first, checks claims, literature, math, methods, and evidence where possible, self-critiques findings, and returns a severity-ranked markdown review.
defaultPrompt: Use Deep Review to review this paper.
Stress-test this proof with Deep Review.
Review this technical memo with Deep Review.
